NewUserGroup.Title: New User Group
AddMembers.Title: Add Members
AddMembers.ShortHelp: Adds the members to the selected user group from the Summary page.
RemoveMembers.Title: Remove Members
RemoveMembers.ShortHelp: Removes the selected member from the user group.
DeleteSelectedGroups.Title: Delete Selected Groups
DeleteSelectedGroups.LongHelp: You cannot delete the context user group if it is connected to a route or a route template.
UserGroupManageSelection.Title: Manage Selection
UserGroupManageSelection.ShortHelp: Manages the selection of the user groups.
UserGroupManageSelection.LongHelp: These selection commands can be useful, when adding or removing groups.
Export.Title: Export
Export.ShortHelp: Exports the selected groups as a csv file.
ViewUserGroup.Title: Switch View
ViewUserGroup.ShortHelp: Switches the view of the user group between Tile and Table views.
Home.Title: Home
AddMemberTab.Title: Add Member
AddMemberTab.ShortHelp: Adds a member to the selected user group from the Members tab.
MembersManageSelection.Title: Manage Selection
MembersManageSelection.ShortHelp: Manages the selection of the members.
MembersManageSelection.LongHelp: These selection commands can be useful, when adding or removing members.
ViewMembers.Title: Switch View
ViewMembers.ShortHelp: Switches the view of the member between Tile and Table views.
RemoveMemberTab.Title: Remove Member
RemoveMemberTab.ShortHelp: Removes the members from one or more groups
AddResponsibilities.Title: Add Responsibilities
AddResponsibilities.ShortHelp: Adds responsibilities to the selected user group from the Responsibilities tab.
RevokeResponsibility.Title: Revoke Responsibility
RevokeResponsibility.ShortHelp: Revokes the granted responsibility of the selected member.
ResponsibilitiesManageSelection.Title: Responsibilities Manage Selection
ResponsibilitiesManageSelection.ShortHel: Manages the selection of the member responsibilities.
ResponsibilitiesManageSelection.LongHelp: These selection commands can be useful, when adding or removing member responsibilities.
ViewResponsibilities.Title: Switch View
ViewResponsibilities.ShortHelp: Switches the view of the responsibility between Tile and Table views.
OpenContextualMenu.Title: Open
DeleteContextualMenu.Title: Delete
DeleteContextualMenu.LongHelp: You must be the owner of the user group to delete it.
DuplicateContextualMenu.Title: Duplicate
DuplicateContextualMenu.ShortHelp: Creates another user group with the same members having the same responsibilities.
FacetDelete.Title: Delete
FilterSearch.Title: Search
FilterSearch.ShortHelp: Searches for user groups in the current platform, or for a member of any of your groups
ChangeVisibility.Title: Change Visibility
ChangeVisibility.ShortHelp: Changes the group visibility from private to public
DeleteSelectedGroup.Title: Delete Selected Group
DeleteSelectedGroup.LongHelp: You must be the owner of the user group to delete it.
